arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah gives perfect response to Everton mayhem as Liverpool man learns hard way
arts.sum: Ian Doyle with the Liverpool analysis after the dramatic Merseyside derby against Everton at Goodison

arts.ttl: Liverpool's next five Premier League games after Merseyside derby
arts.sum: Liverpool's next five Premier League matches after Wednesday's Merseyside derby against Everton.

arts.ttl: Everton and Liverpool sent FA charges warning as punishment truth clear after Merseyside derby
arts.sum: Everton and Liverpool 'failing to control their players' in the Merseyside derby will result in punishment, both clubs have been told

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk accuses Abdoulaye Doucoure of ‘provoking’ Liverpool fans in Merseyside derby chaos
arts.sum: Doucoure and Curtis Jones were sent off amid wild scenes after the Everton player celebrated in front of the away end at Goodison

arts.ttl: David Moyes addresses Liverpool derby 'mayhem' with Arne Slot not allowed to speak
arts.sum: Only one manager was permitted to address the media following a wild end to last Merseyside clash at Goodison Park

arts.ttl: Why Liverpool press conference cancelled after Arne Slot sent off in Merseyside derby chaos
arts.sum: Reds boss unable to address the media after wild Goodison Park scenes thanks to little-known Premier League rule

arts.ttl: Cameras catch how Arne Slot was SENT OFF after angry confrontation with referee Michael Oliver following Liverpool and Everton's full-time chaos
arts.sum: The last Merseyside derby at Everton's famous ground descended into chaos as players clashed in a mass brawl at full-time after James Tarkowski had salvaged a late point.

arts.ttl: Fans mock Arne Slot after footage emerges of Liverpool boss' reaction to Everton's dramatic late equaliser in the Merseyside derby
arts.sum: In footage of Slot from the moment James Tarkowski denied his side a crucial win in their quest to win the Premier League, Slot can be seen frantically motioning to the fourth official.

arts.ttl: Liverpool set to be managed by ex-Everton hero after Arne Slot's derby red card
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot was one of FOUR people shown a red card by referee Michael Oliver following a dramatic Merseyside derby away at Everton on Wednesday

arts.ttl: Who will manage Liverpool vs Wolves after Arne Slot and Sipke Hulshoff red cards?
arts.sum: Why Reds will likely have to turn to former Everton defender after Goodison Park drama
